description: A vibrant coastal landscape rendered in a pointillist or Fauvist manner with thick, expressive brushstrokes. A tall pine tree stands at right, its dark trunk silhouetted against a luminous sky of pink, orange, and yellow at sunset. The sea below reflects warm golden and red hues. Rocky shoreline with green and blue vegetation descends toward the water at lower left. Distant blue mountains or headlands are visible across the bay. The palette is intensely saturated with complementary colors.
